content:
1. Queries a DB for articles in a given month (optionally category-filtered), builds a Report with per-article summaries + aggregates (total_words, article_count). Exists to produce structured monthly analytics output.
2. DB method contracts + data shapes; missing authors; N+1 cost in the loop; Dec rollover; mutation of Report after construction.
3. Unknown — would need to ask the author.
4. Invalid month/year; absent authors; timezone/datetime edge cases; category match sensitivity; large result sets.
